text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin wins the Nikkei Sho and<n>makes an
amazing comeback.

She realizes that she doesn't race<n>because she
has nothing else, but<n>rather because she loves it
and<n>wants to win.

Her resolve thus renewed, Narita<n>Taishin and I set
our sights on the<n>spring Tenno Sho.
